rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE LEHRMAN REVOCABLE TRUST, DATED 9/9/1994 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Confirming Trust Property
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/5/16. A filed stamped courtesy paper of a petition filed conventionally to initiate an e-filed case must have been delivered not later than 1:30 p.m. of the day following electronic filing [Local Rule 2.11T, 14.91F]. Filed stamped copy must be delivered to Room 202 no later than 3 court days prior to continued hearing date. NOTE: proposed order and 6/13/16 filings have been received.
